_note: Source of truth for the marketing portfolio. Read by both src/scripts/marketing-run.ts (creates + launches in sandbox) and src/bots/owner/commands.ts (/campaigns command in Telegram). The doc at docs/01-product/HYPOTHESIS.md is the human-readable narrative that quotes these specs. Margins below are live values pulled via marketing_get_margin_by_product on 2026-05-09; refresh by running `bun run marketing:brief`.

constraint.trustedFor: Numbers below are hypotheses anchored on industry benchmarks (Meta food/bev CTR, food/bev CPL, retargeting uplift). Live sandbox data overrides them after the first launch.

campaigns.name: B2B catering — Meta Lead Gen (Sugar Land + W Houston)
icp: Office managers / EAs at 30–300 person Sugar Land + Energy Corridor offices
Boutique hotels & extended-stay (welcome amenity, in-room gifting)
campaigns.offer: Office Dessert Box — same-day for 6+ guests, $120 starting, 3h lead time. Free first delivery within 5 mi for first booking.
campaigns.creativeStrategy: Broad-net A/B/C learn-then-scale. 6 ad sets × 4 creatives each = 24 ads in week 1. Themes: (1) Monday-morning team treat, (2) client meeting, (3) staff appreciation, (4) holiday office party, (5) realtor closing gift, (6) hotel welcome.
campaigns.audienceSizing: ~85k matched profiles (Houston-Sugar Land DMA, job titles: HR, Office Mgr, EA, Office Coordinator; interests: corporate gifting, event planning).
campaigns.killThreshold: Pause an ad set if CTR < 1.0% after $25 spent OR CPL > $35 after $50 spent.
campaigns.scaleThreshold: Double daily budget on any ad set with CPL < $20 AND SQL rate > 25% over 50 leads.

campaigns.name: B2C anchor — cake "Honey" birthday + anniversary
icp: Women 28–55, Sugar Land + W Houston, family-celebration moments
Multicultural households (CAS / South-Asian / Latin community signals)
campaigns.offer: Cake "Honey" — $55, our signature, 1-hour notice. Perfect centerpiece for birthdays and anniversaries.
campaigns.creativeStrategy: Advantage+ Shopping with 4 creatives: hero product still, cutting-the-cake reel, six-layer slow-mo, customer story.
campaigns.audienceSizing: Advantage+ broad — let Meta optimise within Houston DMA + 25 mi radius. ~250k+ profiles in match set.
campaigns.killThreshold: Pause if CTR < 1.0% after $20 spent OR CAC > $35 after $30 spent.
campaigns.scaleThreshold: Increase budget 50% if ROAS > 3.0× over a rolling 7-day window.

campaigns.name: Retargeting — site visitors + IG engagers (last 30d)
icp: Visited /menu/* in last 30 days (didn't check out)
Engaged with HappyCake IG (saved/commented/DMed) in last 30 days
Lookback on lead-form starters who didn't submit
campaigns.offer: Dynamic — show the SKU the user looked at, paired with a soft nudge: 'still thinking? we'll bake it tomorrow if you order tonight.'
campaigns.creativeStrategy: Dynamic Product Ads on the catalog feed (we expose /api/products, hook DPA to it). Two static carousels for IG-engaged audiences.
campaigns.audienceSizing: Estimated 1,500–4,000 warm profiles in month 1; grows with prospecting spend.
campaigns.killThreshold: Only kill if frequency > 3.5/week AND CTR < 2% — that's audience burn, rotate creative.
campaigns.scaleThreshold: Default state. Budget rises automatically as the warm pool grows from prospecting.

campaigns.name: Google Local — high-intent catering search
icp: Anyone searching 'catering near me', 'office dessert delivery Sugar Land', 'corporate cake delivery Houston' from a 10-mi radius
campaigns.offer: Same as B2B Meta — Office Dessert Box, free first delivery.
campaigns.creativeStrategy: Tightly themed exact-match keywords (no broad). Three ad groups: catering intent, dessert delivery, corporate gifting.
campaigns.audienceSizing: Search volume in Sugar Land + Energy Corridor: ~300–500 monthly impressions for relevant queries.
campaigns.killThreshold: Pause keyword if conversion < 8% after $30 spent.
campaigns.scaleThreshold: Add long-tail variants on any keyword with SQL rate > 30% and CPL < $30.

campaigns.name: Organic — local SEO + content + newsletter (earned, $0 ads)
icp: Long-tail: 'best birthday cake Sugar Land', 'honey cake near me', 'office catering Energy Corridor'
Newsletter readers — captured at site + at counter via QR
campaigns.offer: Newsletter: 'first slice free on your birthday'. Content: monthly bake calendar, how-to-choose guides, behind-the-counter stories.
campaigns.creativeStrategy: Eight evergreen pages in month 1: catering FAQ, Sugar Land delivery zones, allergen guide, birthday-cake size guide, hotel amenity menu, six-layer honey origin story, gluten-aware options, custom-cake pricing reality. Add LocalBusiness, Bakery, Menu schema (already in rubric, see /llms.txt).
campaigns.audienceSizing: Earned traffic ramps to ~1,200/mo organic by month 6 in a competitive metro; subscriber list ramps to ~600 by month 6 with QR-at-counter.
campaigns.killThreshold: Not applicable — content is an asset, not a campaign. Review monthly: pages that drive zero traffic 90 days post-publish get rewritten.
campaigns.scaleThreshold: If a page hits page 1 of Google for its target query, build 3 internal links + 1 outbound from a guest post.

industryBenchmarks._source: Compiled May 2026 from WordStream, Triple Whale, AdAmigo, OwlClaw, Lebesgue, PeopleLinx (catering LTV), Toast POS (restaurant LTV).
